title: Kya Woh Sach Tha
author: Fever FM – HT Smartcast
description: Real life events se inspired supernatural stories ka collection — jo sunoge, roye nahi to rone par majboor zaroor ho jaoge.

episodes.title: #1 Highway Ka Bhoot
episodes.description: Mumbai ke Anuj ke saath uss raat kya hua — highway par ek aisi mulaqaat jisne unki zindagi badal di.
episodes.lyrics:
Raat ka andhera, sunsaan rasta...
Hawayon ka shor, aur woh ajeeb si parchhayi...
Highway par ek akela musafir,
Kya woh sach mein akela tha?

Anuj ne dekha sheeshe mein,
Ek chehra jo wahan nahi hona chahiye tha.
Dil ki dhadkan tez hui,
Saansein rukne lagi...

"Kaun ho tum?" usne pucha.
Koi jawab nahi, bas ek thandi muskurahat.
Woh raat kabhi khatam nahi hui.
Highway ka bhoot aaj bhi wahan hai...

episodes.title: #2 Bachchi Ki Pret Aatma
episodes.description: Lucknow ke Saurabh Sinha ke saath ghati yeh ghatna.

title: Insta Love
author: RosePod
description: Rishi aur Nikita ki love story — breakup ke baad dono ek hi influencer company mein aa jaate hain. Kya intequam hoga ya phir pyaar?

episodes.title: Ep 1 – Love at First Sight
episodes.description: Rishi aur Nikita ki pehli mulaqaat — Nikita ne challenge kiya, Rishi ne accept.
episodes.lyrics:
Insta stories ki woh pehli mulaqat,
Like se shuru hui thi baat.
Nikita ke filters, Rishi ka swag,
Dil ke connection ka yeh tag.

Ek swipe mein badal gayi duniya,
Challenge accept kiya Rishi ne.
Kya yeh sirf ek game tha,
Ya phir sacha pyaar?

Love at first sight, ya screen pe dhoka?
Nikita ne poocha, Rishi ne roka.
Kahani ab shuru hui hai,
Followers ki is bheed mein.

title: Ramayana – HT Smartcast
author: Nitish Bharadwaj
description: Shri Ram ki sampurna katha narrated by Nitish Bharadwaj. Dharma, prem aur tyaag ki anokhi gaatha.

episodes.title: Baal Kand – Shri Ram Janm
episodes.description: Raja Dashrath ke ghar charo bhaion ka janm.

title: Panchatantra Tales
author: Dadi Ma
description: Bacchon ke liye moral stories aur neeti kathaon ka sangreh. Chatury aur buddhimani ki kahaniyan.

episodes.title: Chattur Khargosh
episodes.description: Buddhimani se kaise sher ko haraya.

title: Lo-Fi Indian Beats
author: Chill Nation
description: Studying ya relaxation ke liye best Indian instrumentals aur Lo-Fi beats. Shanti aur sukoon ke liye.

episodes.title: Midnight Raag – Sitar Lo-Fi
episodes.description: Calm sitar melody with rainy lofi beats.

title: Divine Mantras
author: Spiritual India
description: Powerful mantras for daily positive energy and peace. Om Namah Shivaya to Gayatri Mantra.

episodes.title: Om Chanting
episodes.description: Deep meditation Om sound for inner peace.

title: Khooni : Crimes of India
author: Khooni : Crimes of India
description: Presenting Khooni -The Crimes of India Podcast, where every week two Indian girls, try to navigate the murky waters of true crime in their country.

episodes.title: The Murder of Graham Staines
episodes.description: Listen to our episode to find out how Hindutva reared its ugly head in Odisha in 1999.

episodes.title: The Tandoor Murder
episodes.description: Trigger Warning : Domestic Violence, Spousal Violence. Naina Sahni's horrific story.
